pr.title: Switch Nix CI caching from magic-nix-cache to cachix
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Updated the GitHub Actions Nix build workflow to replace DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action with cachix/cachix-action using the doldecomp-melee cache and CACHIX_AUTH_TOKEN. The author validated the change by observing a successful cold-cache run, apparent cache push success, and then confirmed that caching worked after a warmed-cache test.
what_changed: In .github/workflows/build.yml, removed the DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@v2 step from the Nix build job.
Configured the Cachix action with cache name doldecomp-melee.
Configured Cachix authentication via the GitHub secret expression ${{ secrets.CACHIX_AUTH_TOKEN }}.
Kept the existing nix_path setting for cachix/install-nix-action and retained the subsequent nix-build and nix-shell --run "echo OK" validation steps.
smart_moves: Replaced a reportedly broken Nix cache workflow with an explicit Cachix cache configuration instead of relying on magic-nix-cache behavior.
Used a named project cache, doldecomp-melee, making the binary cache destination explicit and searchable in CI configuration.
Used a GitHub Actions secret for the Cachix auth token rather than hardcoding credentials.
Validated both cold-cache behavior and warmed-cache behavior before merging; the author reported the cold run succeeded in 8m30s and later confirmed caching was working again.
decomp_lessons: Build reproducibility and CI speed are part of decompilation infrastructure: working Nix binary caching reduces repeated dependency/build cost for contributors and CI jobs.
When changing cache infrastructure, test both the first cold-cache run and a subsequent warmed-cache run to confirm not only that builds pass, but also that cache push/pull behavior works.
Keep CI cache configuration explicit: action name, version, cache name, and token secret should be visible in the workflow file.
naming_conventions: Cachix cache name used for the project: doldecomp-melee.
GitHub secret name used for Cachix authentication: CACHIX_AUTH_TOKEN.
Workflow action versions are pinned by major version style: cachix/install-nix-action@v25 and cachix/cachix-action@v16.
review_feedback: No formal review comments were present in the provided slice.
Author testing feedback: initial cold-cache run succeeded in 8m30s, described as typical for the broken workflow without caching; pushing to cache appeared to succeed.
Author follow-up feedback after testing a dummy commit: caching was working again.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that update cachix/cachix-action or cachix/install-nix-action versions.
Find PRs or issues mentioning CACHIX_AUTH_TOKEN, doldecomp-melee, or broken Nix caching.
Check whether other workflows besides .github/workflows/build.yml use Nix caching and should use the same Cachix configuration.
